issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

issue.errorLine1: <string name="home_subtitle">Pick up your coding flow from anywhere.</string>
<string name="results_subtitle">Review task summaries, files, and Git follow-ups.</string>
<string name="results_empty">No task summary yet. Run a task first.</string>
<string name="tasks_subtitle">Review queue, summaries, and current todos.</string>
<string name="tasks_running_hint">Tap to open task detail in chat.</string>
<string name="approvals_subtitle">Handle pending approvals without opening chat.</string>
<string name="workflow_refresh_requested">Refresh requested. Waiting for latest agent state.</string>
<string name="workflow_refresh_failed">Refresh request failed. Check pairing or connection.</string>
<string name="home_refresh_summary_empty">Refresh complete. No active tasks or pending approvals.</string>
<string name="environment_port_invalid">Manual port must be between 1 and 65535.</string>
<string name="tasks_search_placeholder">Search task ID, queue prompt, git summary, recent chat...</string>
<string name="tasks_filter_empty">No tasks match the current search or filter.</string>
<string name="results_artifacts_filter_empty">No saved artifacts match the current search or filter.</string>

issue.message: For language "zh" (Chinese) the following quantities are not relevant: `one`
